assessor_raw: Retail escalation prediction: methodologically sound. Temporal split with issue category and channel stratification. PR-AUC well-justified for imbalanced prediction. Both models receive same text input with equal tuning effort. Agent behavior confounds addressed via ablation and per-agent analysis. Label prevalence monitoring across splits. Bootstrap CIs. Test set touched once. Scope bounded to same helpdesk system. Verdict: defense_wins.
